title: MALDIassist: Mathematical Utilities for MALDI-TOF Mass Spectrometry
description: An R package for MALDI-TOF mass spectrometry workflows: loading Bruker spectra, smoothing and baseline correction, Gaussian kernel-regression peak detection including shoulder peaks via weighted curvature, peak-quality metrics and filtering, and cohort-level feature construction. Performance-critical routines are implemented in C++ via Rcpp.
